title: oenothera hartwegii subvar. filifolia
intro: Oenothera hartwegii subvar. filifolia, also known as California evening primrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the evening primrose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Oenothera hartwegii subvar. filifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues.
